text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen's achievements have left a
lasting mark on the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've successfully navigated the crucial initial
three years together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while basking in the glory of our
accomplishments...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hmm, I see... My, that's a good idea.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I received a letter from the estate. Apparently,
they're going to hold a party in honor of my
victories.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
What's more, they wrote that they hope you'll
attend as well!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It says, "Allow us to offer our hospitality to the
trainer who guided McQueen to victory." Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh, there's no need for you to be so nervous.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The ladies will be wearing simple dresses, and the
gentlemen will be in suits.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Is that so? Then... Oh, I know!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Let's go clothes shopping on our next day off!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I would like to properly introduce the person I'm
proud to call my trainer to everyone!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I hope you're ready for that.
